subject.title: Mathematics Applications & Interpretation (AI)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics: Applications and Interpretation** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **real-world applications of mathematics, statistical analysis, mathematical modeling, and data interpretation**, with a strong focus on **technology use, practical problem-solving, and interpreting mathematical results in context**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | External examination (calculator permitted) | 1h 30min | 2h | SL: 40%, HL: 30% |
| **Paper 2** | External examination (technology required) | 1h 30min | 2h | SL: 40%, HL: 30% |
| **Paper 3** | External examination (technology required) | N/A | 1h | HL: 20% |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal assessment | 30h | 30h | 20% |

strengths: Clear structure with a detailed table of contents and logical progression between sections
Consistent use of headings and numbered tables to guide the reader
Relevant material supports the statistical aim throughout
weaknesses: Some repetition in narrative background disrupts conciseness
Table splits and missing entries (e.g., empty Table 10) interrupt flow
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Although the exploration is coherent and well organized (Band 3), minor lapses in conciseness, table formatting, and reference consistency prevent it from achieving a higher level of precision. A mid-level score of 2 reflects solid logical development and structure, while acknowledging the documented weaknesses.

strengths: Correct use of key symbols (Î¼, Î±, p) and clear hypothesis notation
Effective tables and graphs accurately present data and summary statistics
Generally clear narrative linking numerical results to conclusions
weaknesses: Formatting glitches (negative p-values, stray bold symbols) reduce consistency
Occasional informal language (âI fail reject the nullâ) could mislead interpretation
Some representations (e.g., Figure 2) lack complete labels and formatting
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The student demonstrates mostly appropriate mathematical language and effective representations (Band 3), but recurring formatting inconsistencies and minor clarity issues justify a score of 2 rather than a higher mark.

strengths: Topic choice and data collection stem from genuine personal interest
Personal voice and rationale show clear engagement
Initiative shown in combining various data sources
weaknesses: The mathematical approach follows standard class exemplars with limited independence
Engagement, while clear, does not consistently drive deeper mathematical insight
Creativity is present but remains within routine statistical procedures
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Evidence of independent thinking and a personal approach is clear (Band 2), but the reliance on familiar methods and lack of outstanding creative initiative warrant a lower mark of 1 within the 0â3 range.

strengths: Meaningful discussion of limitations with proposed concrete improvements
Some critique of data sources and practical constraints adds depth
Reflections connect results back to the research question
weaknesses: Critical analysis of statistical assumptions is minimal
Reflection on how data skewness affects results is lacking
Reliance on non-academic sources undermines credibility
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exploration contains meaningful reflection and some critique (Band 2), but limited depth in statistical self-analysis and uneven source credibility justify a score of 1 out of 3.

strengths: Appropriate application of two-sample t-tests at SL course level
Clear justification of conclusions based on p-values and summary statistics
Relevant mathematics used purposefully to answer the research question
weaknesses: Minor errors in p-value formatting (negative values, rounding)
Occasional misinterpretation of 'fail to reject' outcomes
No tests for normality or variance equality to support t-test assumptions
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The mathematics is relevant and used effectively (Band 4), though minor correctness issues and limited methodological rigour (e.g., missing assumption tests) prevent full sophistication. A score of 3 reflects the balance of strengths and noted weaknesses.

strandSelections.reasoning: The choice of topic emanates from the studentâs own gaming experience, and they gather part of the data personally.  Selecting groupings for the t-tests also shows decision-making.  Nonetheless, most of the mathematical route (standard t-test comparisons) is routine and closely mirrors class exemplars, so the evidence is âsignificantâ but not âoutstandingâ.  Band 2.

The student demonstrates solid knowledge of mean, standard deviation, hypothesis testing and significance levels.  Explanations indicate understanding but occasional misconceptions (e.g., equating smaller p-value with âbetterâ without context) reveal gaps.  Consequently, understanding is âgood in partsâ rather than thorough, corresponding to Band 3.

Sample statistics appear reasonable, and most p-values correspond to the stated means and standard deviations.  However, negative p-values, rounding inconsistencies, and a misinterpretation of several âfail to rejectâ outcomes introduce noticeable but not pervasive errors.  This aligns with "mostly correct" mathematicsâBand 3.

Most of the material directly supports the aim of identifying the most efficient shiny-hunting method.  However, sizeable narrative passages about game history and mechanics, and repeated explanations of the same limitations, add superfluous length.  Hence the work is "relevant and mostly concise" rather than "highly concise", matching Band 3.

Symbols such as Î¼, Î±, p-value and standard deviation are used correctly and hypotheses are stated with proper notation.  Occasional formatting glitches (negative p-values, stray bold symbols) and informal wording (âI fail reject the nullâ) reduce consistency but do not obscure meaning.  This is best described as "mostly appropriate mathematical language and notation" (Band 3).

Explanations of tests, results tables and accompanying narrative are generally clear; the reader can see how conclusions follow from numerical evidence.  Some inconsistencies (e.g.
claiming significance after âfail to rejectâ) interrupt absolute consistency, so Band 3 (âclear and mostly consistentâ) fits best.

A two-sample t-test is fully within the SL syllabus and is applied to eight methods in logically-grouped comparisons; means, standard deviations and p-values are tabulated.  The mathematics is clearly relevant, at the correct course level, and utilised purposefully to answer the research question.  It is not especially sophisticated, so Band 4 ("used effectively") is the best fit.

The student employs multiple tables of raw data and summary statistics, one comparative bar graph, and the occasional image for context.  These representations are accurate and referred to in the text, giving an "effective" though not sophisticated use of representations.  Band 3 is therefore appropriate.

The student comments on limitations (time, data reliability) and proposes concrete improvements (recording time, larger sample, new method variant).  This constitutes âmeaningful reflectionâ present throughout, though it stops short of deep, critical interrogation of statistical assumptions.  Band 2.

Collecting original data for three methods, sourcing further data from videos, and combining eight different game mechanics displays notable initiative.  Creativity is visible but remains within a single statistical technique, so it is more than limited yet not outstandingâBand 2.

The report follows a clear progression: introduction, methodology, grouped t-tests, interpretation, and conclusion.  Links between sections are usually explicit (e.g.
"Having conducted all these t-tests the final answer is very clear").  Minor lapses such as repetition of background narrative or small digressions about the games do not seriously disrupt the reader, yet they prevent the exploration from feeling âhighly coherentâ.  Overall, coherence and logical development are solid but not exemplary, fitting Band 3.

There is some critiqueâe.g., recognising misapplied Catch Combo mechanics and noting potential bias from video sources.  Yet the statistical reasoning (e.g., equating a p-value of 0.05 3 with significance after failing to reject) is not deeply analysed.  Hence âmeaningful analysis with some critiqueâ fits Band 2.

The reflections explicitly connect results back to the aim, discussing why Ultra-Wormholes win statistically but Mass-Outbreaks may be preferred in practice.  This evidences a "clear connection to understanding" but is not strong enough to claim enhancement, thus Band 2.

Headings, numbered tables, and a table of contents give the work an unmistakable structure with introduction, body, and conclusion.  Sections appear in a sensible order and the reader can follow the argument without difficulty.  Nevertheless, some tables are split awkwardly across pages and a few headings repeat the same content, so the flow is not completely seamless.  These features align with the descriptor "well organised with clear introduction, body and conclusion" (Band 3).

A clear personal voice runs through the narrative (âI have been playing PokÃ©mon sinceâ¦â, âmy aim isâ¦â).  The exploration is driven by the studentâs interest and choices about which methods to group.  This meets the descriptor of a "clear personal approach" but does not yet enhance mathematical understanding to an exceptional degree, warranting Band 2.

annotations.comment: The title is concise and effectively encapsulates the investigationâs focus, guiding the reader clearly into the exploration.
The table of contents comprehensively outlines each section, supporting easy navigation through the explorationâs structure.
Several TOC rows omit page numbers for subheadings, which may confuse the reader when locating specific sections.
The introduction contains extensive narrative history; consider condensing background details to maintain focus on the explorationâs statistical aim.
The rationale effectively conveys personal interest and independent thinking, demonstrating strong engagement with the topic.
Include the explicit calculation $$\frac{1}{4096}\times3=\frac{1}{1365}$$ to clarify the derivation of the increased shiny-charm probability.
The sampling strategy is described clearly, but relying on external video data introduces potential bias; consider standardizing data collection to control for consistency.
The explanation of expected-value calculation demonstrates sound understanding; the use of fraction notation enhances mathematical clarity.
Table 1 succinctly presents method names, odds and expected values, providing a clear multiple representation of the mathematical parameters.
Ultra Wormholeâs expected encounter value is shown as â--â; consider estimating or computing this value to maintain completeness in mathematical comparison.
The limitations section acknowledges key constraints but references Ultra Wormholes discussion promised later; ensure all limitations are fully addressed for coherence.
Hypotheses are stated with clear notation $$H_0: \mu_{Mx}=\mu_{My},\ H_1: \mu_{Mx}\neq\mu_{My}$$, enhancing mathematical communication.
The phrase âI fail reject the nullâ should read âfail to reject the nullâ; precise language ensures correct interpretation of hypothesis test outcomes.
Consider discussing t-test assumptions (normality, equal variances) to strengthen the methodological rigour of grouping comparisons.
Table 4 effectively displays mean, standard deviation and sample size; column labels are clear and consistent.
Interpreting lower p-values as âbetterâ without rejecting Hâ can be misleading; rely strictly on the threshold rule when drawing conclusions.
Ensure consistent formatting of mathematical symbols (e.g., uniform bold or italic styling for $$\alpha$$ and $$p$$ throughout tables).
The grouping rationale for chaining methods demonstrates independent thinking and thoughtful personal approach.
Test 7âs p-value (0.0503) exceeds 0.05 yet is treated as significant; clarify the decision rule or adjust the significance level rationale.
Late p-value entries are shown as negative or using unconventional notation; correct the sign and use standard formatting (e.g., ~0.000383).
The conclusion that method 8 is most effective is well justified by comparing p-values and aligns with the statistical evidence.
Table 10 is empty; populate this table with the expected and mean values or remove it if redundant.
The âAnswerâ section succinctly links statistical results back to the research question, enhancing coherence of the exploration.
Figure 2 lacks explicit axis labels in the caption; include both axes descriptors to improve clarity and interpretation.
The detailed Catch Combo method explanation appears in a later section; consider moving key methodological details earlier for better logical development.
Include the formula or derivation for Ultra Wormhole encounter odds instead of a plain percentage to reinforce understanding of the calculation.
The discussion of practical constraints beyond statisticsâconsole longevity, species varietyâadds depth and critical reflection to the conclusion.
Reference to âChatGTPâ lacks academic credibility; cite authoritative sources to support contextual claims.
The proposal to measure time for each method is insightful and would significantly strengthen the explorationâs relevance and rigour.
Consider including tests for normality or variance equality in room for improvement, to critically analyse t-test validity.
Suggesting a collaborative data collection team demonstrates initiative and could reduce sampling variability.
The reflection omits critique of statistical assumptions; discuss how deviations might affect results for deeper analysis.
Acknowledging newly discovered mechanics affecting Catch Combo data highlights substantial critical reflection and initiative.
Reflecting on how extreme sample values might skew mean and standard deviation would add depth to the data analysis discussion.
References show inconsistent citation formatting and incomplete URLs; apply a standard style (e.g., APA) for professionalism.
The reference list relies heavily on video sources; balance with peer-reviewed or academic literature to strengthen source credibility.
Remove LaTeX commands from reference entries; references should use plain text formatting for readability.
Inclusion of domain-specific sites like Serebii.net underpins the explorationâs contextual validity and demonstrates thorough research.
